channel.title: Dirty Laundry
channel.description: Latest releases from Dirty Laundry on Dropout.tv

item.title: Jack Rose
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a drink that's bright and fruity.

Duration: 02:58

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY

item.title: Who Joined an Ex on Their Honeymoon?
item.description:
The cast of Critical Role drinks a Jack Rose and gives Grant a special gift.

Duration: 47:19

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, matthew mercer, aimee carrero, robbie daymond, taliesin jaffe, critical role
